info.title: Switch Bluelight Filter
info.author: IMXNOOBX
info.description: Easy to use bluelight filter overlay!
info.details:
⛺ Blue Light Filter

A homebrew application for the Nintendo Switch that tries to reduces blue light emission from the screen by creating a yellow-ish overlay on top of all applications.

🎯 Features
 - Adjustable intensity of the blue light filter
 - Configurable via a simple menu in the Tesla Overlay
 - No-to-little performance impact

🧩 Contribute
This project its a work in progress and any help/improvements are welcomed! 
https://github.com/IMXNOOBX/switch-bluelight-filter
